tools.name: sync_markdown_documents
tools.title: Sync Markdown Documents
tools.description: Scan workspace markdown files and synchronize structured documents into the SOPLang workspace without executing the workspace build pipeline.

tools.name: execute_workspace_build
tools.title: Execute Workspace Build
tools.description: Run the SOPLang workspace build pipeline after document sync. This may execute long-running skills.

tools.name: get_variables_with_values
tools.title: Get Variables with Values
tools.description: Return workspace SOPLang variables enriched with their resolved values.

tools.name: get_variable_with_value
tools.title: Get Variable with Value
tools.description: Return a single SOPLang variable with its resolved value and error info.

tools.name: get_commands
tools.title: Get Commands
tools.description: Return the registered SOPLang commands from the workspace.

tools.name: get_types
tools.title: Get Custom Types
tools.description: Return the registered SOPLang custom types from the workspace.

tools.name: execute_skill
tools.title: Execute Skill
tools.description: Execute a discovered Achilles skill through the AchillesSkills bridge.

promptText.description: Prompt text passed to the skill
